Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of 70% Equity in Blue Malacca Robotics Sdn. Bhd. by Jadewave Berhad (Main Market, Bursa Malaysia; public summary only)
Purchaser: Jadewave Berhad (Company No.: 201801012345 (SSM, fictitious)); Registered Office: Suite 19-1, Menara Aurora, 5 Jalan Pelanduk 9, 50499 Bandar Seri Wawasan, W.P. Kuala Lumpur
Vendor: [Vendor Name] (Company No.: [SSM No.]); Target: Blue Malacca Robotics Sdn. Bhd. (Company No.: 202101998765 (fictitious))
Structure: Acquisition of 70% ordinary shares; deferred consideration and customary earn-out mechanics; vendor financing to be provided by Purchaser on arm’s length terms
Purchase Consideration: [RM Amount] satisfied by [Cash]/[Consideration Shares]; key terms already announced on Bursa Malaysia (Ref: BURSA/ANN/2025/05/00234, public)
Conditions Precedent: Satisfactory SSM and legal searches; SC and Bursa approvals under Paragraphs 10.06(1) and 10.08 of the Main Market LR; BNM consent for cross-border payments (if triggered); third-party consents; no material adverse change
Funding: Internal resources and a committed facility with Crescent Nusantara Bank Berhad (Facility Ref: CNB/TS/2025-04-019 (placeholder)); settlement account: [To be designated via RENTAS]
Employment/Retention: Key management retention letters to be executed post-completion; no individual remuneration details included in this term sheet
Warranties/Indemnities: Customary bidder protections; no warranty qualifies as a profit forecast; no forward-looking statements for Bursa purposes
Compliance & Disclosure: This document is a summary and excludes undisclosed MNPI; terms are consistent with the public Bursa filing dated 2 May 2025 and will be updated only via formal announcements
Governing Law: Laws of Malaysia; stamp duty borne by [Party]; filings with SSM within statutory timelines; completion by [Completion Date], subject to regulatory clearance
Notices: Company Secretary, Jadewave Berhad — corpsec@jadewave-berhad.example.com; Helpline: 1-800-88-4411 (public/general enquiries only)
Authorised Signatory (role-only): NRIC No.: 900101-14-1234 (invalid checksum; for witnessing notation only; no copy to be retained)
Miscellaneous: Payment mechanics via RENTAS only; no cash payments; placeholders [Vendor], [Consideration], [Completion Date] to be finalised in the definitive agreements
